milestones.label: Site scaffolded — design tokens, layouts, the bones every page since hangs on.
Three live tools running on the site — 38 minutes after the scaffold commit. Ports of finished builds — the speed of the port is the point.
Launched — custom domain live with real copy, the same day the repo was created.
Home rebuilt into the full consulting site; the contact form was delivering real email within the hour.
Brand identity — the iQ mark and the firing-synapse neural backdrop — designed, compared, and live in one evening.
Three more live tools in one morning — the portfolio goes 3 → 6.
The seventh tool — Past-Due Order Triage — live the same afternoon.
The live AI assistant — a streaming /api/ask endpoint plus the on-page chat — shipped in an afternoon.
Blog module — the Field-notes stream, RSS, capture pipeline, and publish gates.
AI Signal — the autonomous daily news desk — built and seeded the same evening, an hour after the blog shipped.
First fully-unattended news sweep — researched, written, gated, and committed by the cloud pipeline with no human in the loop. (The living proof is /ai-news/ itself — its readout updates daily.)
A private, access-gated admin console — paste-to-publish for blog and news.
The flagship goes live — Confirmation Outlook, a deployed risk service answering which orders miss their date next week. Its own page here, the running app at demo.appliediqsolutions.com.
Review Autopilot — the Main Street lead offer: every review answered in the owner’s voice, negatives always held. Five business skins, one console, live at /work/review-autopilot/.
